content:
# Session 16 (iter-016) ‚Äî review summary

## Metadata
- File: `AlgebraicJacobian/RiemannRoch/OcOfD.lean` (single lane).
- Decl-level sorry: **11 ‚Üí 6** (file). 5 closed + 1 helper added.
- All 5 closed decls **axiom-clean** `{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}` (verified via `lean_verify` on `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`, `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup`, `exists_open_mem_carrierSubmoduleSheaf`).
- Build green; only warning = `open scoped Classical` lint (pre-existing).

## Headline ‚Äî the entire carrier-stalk chain closed (binding leaf dissolved)
iter-015 isolated the S3 deep work in the binding leaf `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq` (feared 200‚Äì400 LOC, no Mathlib carrier-stalk API). iter-016 closed it AND both seams it factors through, all axiom-clean:

- **B0 `finite_orderConstraintFail_affine`** ‚Äî DIVERGED from blueprint. The blueprint routes via the affine `finite_order_support_affine`, but that lemma is `private` in `WeilDivisor.lean` (cross-file inaccessible). Prover pivoted to GLOBAL finiteness of the principal-divisor support `Scheme.WeilDivisor.principal g hg` (a `Finsupp`) on the proper curve ‚Äî strictly stronger, avoids the bridge. Cost: un-omitted `[IsProper C.hom]`. Name + `\lean` pin unchanged.
- **B1 `exists_open_mem_carrierSubmoduleSheaf`** ‚Äî `g=0‚ÜíU=‚ä§`; else affine `W‚àãP.point`, bad set `B` finite (B0), each prime-divisor point closed (`isClosed_singleton_of_coheight_eq_one` + `krullDim_curve_le_one`), `Z=‚ãÉ_{Q‚ààB}{Q.point}` closed, `U:=W‚äìZ·∂ú`. Gotcha: `TopologicalSpace.Opens.not_mem_bot` absent ‚Üí membership-rewrite `have hbot' : (W‚äìZc)=‚ä• := hbot; rw[hbot']`.
- **B `iSup_carrierSubmoduleSheaf_eq_orderAtPSubmodule`** ‚Äî `le_antisymm`; `‚â§` via `iSup_le` pointwise at `Q=P`; `‚â•` via B1 + `Submodule.mem_iSup_of_mem`.
- **Seam A `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup`** (the "IF BUDGET REMAINS" stretch) ‚Äî germ-API bijective descent per `analogies/stalk-colimit.md`: `œÜ := colimit.desc` of the descent cocone (legs = `Submodule.inclusion`), cocone naturality reduced to new helper `carrierPresheaf_map_coe`; injective via `injective_iff_map_eq_zero`, surjective via `Submodule.mem_iSup_of_directed` (family directed through `U‚äìV`); `ConcreteCategory.isIso_iff_bijective` + `asIso`.
- **`carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`** (binding leaf) ‚Äî `carrierSheaf_stalk_iso_iSup ‚â™‚â´ eqToIso (by rw [B])`. Two lines once A+B existed.
- **New helper `carrierPresheaf_map_coe`** ‚Äî `(((carrierPresheaf D).map g).hom x).1 = x.1` away from `‚ä•`. NO blueprint entry (coverage debt).

## Still open (6 decls / 7 sorry-bodies)
- `cokernel_stalk_at_iso_kbar` (G2), `cokernel_skyscraper_hom` (+`_isIso`) (G3) ‚Äî now UNBLOCKED by closed `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`, planner-deferred this iter (mult-by-`œÄ^{n+1}` automorphism + residue=kÃÑ).
- `carrierSheaf_zero_iso_toModuleKSheaf` (bridge) ‚Äî deep, NOT attempted. Hartshorne II.6.3A; Mathlib gap pinned: `IsDedekindDomain.HeightOneSpectrum.mem_integers_of_valuation_le_one`. Needs Dedekind-per-chart + valuation=order + gluing (~150‚Äì250 LOC, dedicated lane).
- `sheafOf_ses_single_add` corners √ó2 ‚Äî gated on the bridge.
- `sheafOf_singlePoint` (L771) ‚Äî off-cone (OCofP private internals).

## Review subagents (both 0 must-fix)
- **lean-auditor/iter016** (`logs/iter-016/lean-auditor-iter016-report.md`): 0/6/3. All 6 majors = stale docstrings/headers claiming STUBBED/Tier-3-sorry for now-closed `sheafOf`/`sheafOf_zero`/`carrierSheaf_stalk_eq`. `asIso`/`colimit.desc` assembly sound + non-circular; `omit ‚Ä¶ in` scopes correct (no vacuating drops); `eqToIso (by rw)` honest. Minor: `hW : IsAffineOpen W` is a dead param in B0. No laundering, no axioms.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker/ocofd** (`logs/iter-016/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-ocofd-report.md`): 0 must-fix, 1 major + 4 minor. Confirms 5 chain decls axiom-clean, every `\lean` pin resolves. MAJOR = B0 divergence (blueprint still sketches affine route + spurious `\uses lem:finite_order_support_affine` edges) ‚Üí I added a `% NOTE:` (below); prose rewrite + `\uses` removal routed to planner. Minors: `carrierPresheaf_map_coe` coverage debt; `carrierSheaf_stalk_eq_fractionalIdeal` chapter promises the explicit `œÄ_P^{-n}ùí™` form (Lean delivers `‚âÖ orderAtPSubmodule`, identification prose-only); nonzero-`g` hypothesis chapter states but Lean drops; over-elaborate injectivity sketch in seam-A. Seam-A colimit prose judged adequate.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex`, `lem:finite_orderConstraintFail_affine`: added `% NOTE:` documenting the iter-016 B0 divergence (Lean uses global `principal`-divisor finiteness, not the affine `finite_order_support_affine`; the two `\uses` edges are now spurious; needs `[IsProper C.hom]`). Routed the prose-rewrite + `\uses`-removal to the planner.
- No `\leanok` overrides (sync iter=16, +5/‚àí0 on the 5 chain decls ‚Äî correct). No `\mathlibok` warranted.

## sync_leanok attribution
`sync_leanok-state.json` iter=16, sha 98374cb, +5/‚àí0 on `RiemannRoch_OcOfD.tex` ‚Äî exactly the 5 closed chain decls. Verified, no laundering.

## blueprint-doctor
Clean ‚Äî no orphan chapters, no broken refs, no new axioms.

## Coverage debt (`archon dag-query unmatched`)
139 unmatched `lean_aux` nodes; 138 are out-of-cone substrate (Cohomology/*, Genus0BaseObjects/* ‚Äî never owed blueprint per ARCHON_MEMORY). The ONE new in-cone uncovered decl is `sheafOf.carrierPresheaf_map_coe` ‚Üí listed in recommendations.

## Recommendations (see recommendations.md)
Lead with the G2/G3 cokernel leaves (now unblocked) as the next prover lane; the Hartshorne-6.3A bridge as a dedicated mathlib-build lane; the B0 blueprint prose rewrite; the comment-only OcOfD docstring cleanup; the `carrierPresheaf_map_coe` blueprint entry.
